title: eriosema angolense
intro: Eriosema angolense is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Eriosema angolense has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties and ability to boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
